texto: Somewhere a bird sang, its chant hanging plaintive and melancholy in the still air...I think it's a sort of lark or something. Our tradition has it that they sing with the voices of lost lovers. If the stars are smiling on them, you will hear its mate call back in a moment.
explicacao: Citação de Jane Johnson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Somewhere a bird sang, its chant hanging plaintive and melancholy in the still air...I think it's…” articula reflexao, birds, lovers em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como lovers e song.
